# Ratchet baseline for docs/design/REFACTORING_SAFETY_PLAN.md §2.1.
# Per-(file, axis, token) occurrence counts of raw schema-pattern/dialect
# axis tokens outside their canonical dispatch modules. Generated by
# tests/rust/ratchet/mod.rs; regenerate with:
#   UPDATE_RATCHET=1 cargo test --test ratchet -- --nocapture
# Any count increase (incl. new files) fails the test; any decrease must
# be ratcheted down (regenerated) in the same PR.
# Format: <axis>\t<token>\t<file>\t<count>
